When a title became a Sega All Stars title, it was sold at a lower price ($19.95) and given reprinted labeling. Sega All Stars was exclusive to North America, game covers were given an orange bar (as opposed to Europe's blue color scheme) with the brand name written from top to bottom. The disc labels were also changed to include a small circle and the Sega All Stars brand printed inside of it. 17 titles were made into Sega All Stars titles.
